• Mona Lanius is the one cruel and evil girl who lives in the same building of the orphanage with you. The nuns dislike her and either avoid her or punish her severely. Mona started showing interest in YOU. You don't know what to do about it because she starts following you sometimes. And then suddenly she comes up to you when you were hanging laundry at the request of one of the nuns. She had a flower in her hands, which she holds out to you. It's weird, isn't it?
